title: ophrys holosericea psp. scolopax
side_effects: Ophrys holosericea psp. scolopax can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, digestive issues, and cardiovascular problems. Ingesting large quantities of the plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, while prolonged use may cause headaches and fatigue. Overexposure to the plant's compounds can also irritate the skin and eyes, resulting in redness, itching, and blurred vision. In extreme cases, improper use of Ophrys holosericea psp. scolopax can even trigger life-threatening conditions, such as anaphylaxis and cardiac arrest.
